'''fatozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabinetworking|cabinetworking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabinetworking|cabinetworking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fatozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fætezeth|fætezeth]] || [[word:fætezej|fætezej]] || [[word:fætezesh|fætezesh]] || [[word:fæteze|fæteze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fatotozoth|fatotozoth]] || [[word:fatotozoj|fatotozoj]] || [[word:fatotozosh|fatotozosh]] || [[word:fatotozo|fatotozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fatozoth|fatozoth]] || [[word:fatozoj|fatozoj]] || [[word:fatozosh|fatozosh]] || [[word:fatozo|fatozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fatofzoth|fatofzoth]] || [[word:fatofzoj|fatofzoj]] || [[word:fatofzosh|fatofzosh]] || [[word:fatofzof|fatofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fatozotho|fatozotho]] || [[word:fatozojo|fatozojo]] || [[word:fatozosho|fatozosho]] || [[word:fatozoko|fatozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fatozoth|fatozoth]] || [[word:fatozoj|fatozoj]] || [[word:fatozosh|fatozosh]] || [[word:fatozo|fatozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fatozothol|fatozothol]] || [[word:fatozojol|fatozojol]] || [[word:fatozoshol|fatozoshol]] || [[word:fatozokol|fatozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fatozothotho|fatozothotho]] || [[word:fatozojojo|fatozojojo]] || [[word:fatozoshosho|fatozoshosho]] || [[word:fatozoko|fatozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fatozothon|fatozothon]] || [[word:fatozojon|fatozojon]] || [[word:fatozoshon|fatozoshon]] || [[word:fatozokon|fatozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fatozothoro|fatozothoro]] || [[word:fatozojoro|fatozojoro]] || [[word:fatozoshoro|fatozoshoro]] || [[word:fatozokoro|fatozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
